meaning: n.奈拉(尼日利亚的货币单位)
examples: Wait, let me convert it. That is roughly 30,000 naira.
The training is largely yet to materialise. Monthly stipends of 65,000 naira ($430) are often paid late.
Two big men no go give only twenty naira to two officers!
The Lagosian keeps mumbling that he has to get more out of the trip than the forty naira he just paid the old O.
